mnemonics: Use 'UP In Phases' to remember the Unified Process phases: Inception, Elaboration, Construction, Transition
keyPoints: The Unified Process is iterative and incremental, dividing the project into cycles and iterations.
It is architecture-centric, focusing on the software architecture as a primary artifact.
The process is risk-driven, prioritizing the highest risks early in the project lifecycle.
commonMistakes: Confusing the Unified Process with a rigid, linear waterfall model instead of its iterative nature.
Neglecting risk management and not addressing high-risk items early in the inception and elaboration phases.
